title: Comparison of Flat vs. Nested Distributed Transactions
description: A flowchart illustrating the structural and execution differences between flat and nested transaction models in a distributed system.
relationships: Client initiates flat transaction with Coordinator
Coordinator directly manages Participants A & B in a flat structure
Client initiates nested transaction with Coordinator
Coordinator delegates a sub-transaction to a Sub-Coordinator
Sub-Coordinator manages Sub-Participant C, creating a hierarchy
